decisions.name: previous_version_house_count_check
decisions.label: New version houses
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: has less or equal to previous

Flow.description: Portal Screen for inputting property counts included in the batch with tenure and fuel types when creating and editing batches
Flow.label: ABS FORM - Property Information

loops.description: Separate loop so that we don't include properties where they've added the same tenure type and fuel type multiple times in the property count if we are going to discount the duplicates
loops.name: Loop_New_Batch_Properties
loops.label: Loop New Batch Properties

screens.name: Confirm_Property_reset
screens.label: Confirm Property reset
screens.backButtonLabel: Cancel and Return to Edit Screen

fields.name: BatchId_ConfirmRest
fields.fieldText:
{!Batch.LA_Identifier__c}

Version {!Batch.Version_Number__c}

fields.name: PropertyInformation_ConfirmRest
fields.fieldText: WARNING: IF YOU CONTINUE ALL PROPERTY INFORMATION FOR THIS BATCH WILL BE RESET (EXISTING TENURES DETAIL AND MEASURE TYPES WILL REMAIN)

fields.name: BatchId_Create
fields.fieldText:
{!Batch.LA_Identifier__c}

Version {!Batch.Version_Number__c}

fields.name: GuidanceInfo
fields.fieldText:
Please click to add the relevant tenures included in this batch. 

 

Owner occupied is a tenure category for where the home is owned by the occupying household.

 

100% funded privately rented is a tenure category for privately rented homes to be fully funded by the grant. Landlords can only claim one property in their portfolio as fully funded across this scheme, with all subsequent homes requiring a 50% cost contribution from the landlord. To include a home in this category, you must have received confirmation from DESNZ and/or its delivery partner that a check has been completed to confirm that this is the first home to be upgraded for that landlord.

 

50% funded privately rented is a tenure category for privately rented homes to be 50% funded by the grant, and 50% funded by the landlord. This category is for all subsequent homes owned by the same landlord, once they have received a home fully funded under this scheme. 

 

Social housing (in-fill only) is the final tenure category. Note social housing is ineligible for this scheme, except for in-fill purposes only. Social housing for in-fill purposes is capped at 10% of homes treated under your project and you must keep evidence that it is a genuine case of in-fill for audit purposes.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_ErrorToManyHomesText
fields.fieldText:
ERROR: The Number of homes cannot be increased on a new version of a batch

Total homes on previous version: {!Batch.Previous_Version__r.Total_Homes__c}

Total homes added on this version: {!varSumNewHouses}

fields.name: BatchId
fields.fieldText:
{!Batch.LA_Identifier__c}

Version {!Batch.Version_Number__c}

fields.name: GuidanceInfo2
fields.fieldText:
Please click to add the relevant tenures included in this batch. 

 

Owner occupied is a tenure category for where the home is owned by the occupying household.

 

100% funded privately rented is a tenure category for privately rented homes to be fully funded by the grant. Landlords can only claim one property in their portfolio as fully funded across this scheme, with all subsequent homes requiring a 50% cost contribution from the landlord. To include a home in this category, you must have received confirmation from DESNZ and/or its delivery partner that a check has been completed to confirm that this is the first home to be upgraded for that landlord.

 

50% funded privately rented is a tenure category for privately rented homes to be 50% funded by the grant, and 50% funded by the landlord. This category is for all subsequent homes owned by the same landlord, once they have received a home fully funded under this scheme. 

 

Social housing (in-fill only) is the final tenure category. Note social housing is ineligible for this scheme, except for in-fill purposes only. Social housing for in-fill purposes is capped at 10% of homes treated under your project and you must keep evidence that it is a genuine case of in-fill for audit purposes.

fields.name: ErrorToManyHomesText
fields.fieldText:
ERROR: The Number of homes cannot be increased on a new version of a batch

Total homes on previous version: {!Batch.Previous_Version__r.Total_Homes__c}

Total homes added on this version: {!varSumNewHouses}

fields.name: What_is_the_fuel_type
fields.fieldText: What is the fuel type? (* Required)

fields.name: What_is_the_number_of_properties
fields.fieldText: What is the number of properties? (* Required)
